steps.description: Ordered list of tour steps. Each step targets a DOM element via a CSS selector.

isOpen.description: Controls whether the tour is visible.

onClose.description: Called when the user skips or completes the tour.

initialStep.description: Zero-based index of the step to start from.

zIndex.description: Base z-index for the tour overlay, highlight, and tooltip layers. Defaults above modals/drawers per popover rules.

ariaLabel.description: Accessible name for the tour dialog read by screen readers.

interactiveHighlight.description: When true, clicks pass through the highlight overlay so users can interact with the highlighted element during the tour.

onMissingStep.description: Called when a step's selector does not match any element so consumers can advance, retry, or surface the issue.

selector.description: CSS selector that identifies the target DOM element for this step.

title.description: Optional heading shown at the top of the tooltip.

content.description: Body content of the step tooltip. Supports JSX.

placement.description: Preferred side for the tooltip relative to the target element. Falls back automatically if there is not enough space.

order.description: Explicit sort order for this step (defaults to array index position).

onNext.description: Callback fired when the user advances past this step.

onPrev.description: Callback fired when the user goes back to this step.

onSkip.description: Callback fired when the user skips the tour from this step.
